chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3298 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For directions. For order as to non-prosecution. 06.08.2024. Mr. Abdul Rehman Adeed, Advocate for Petitioner. -------------- Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
